label: .NET Developer / Database Administrator at NWMLS
headline: .NET Developer / Database Administrator – Full Stack, C#, ASP.NET, SQL Server, T-SQL

iadvantage.title: Lead .NET Developer / Database Administrator
description: Led delivery of full-stack GLP-compliant lab software, leveraging ASP.NET WebForms/MVC/WebAPI with REST OData and SOAP APIs backed by Oracle using nHibernate, Entity Framework, and PL/SQL for robust database systems.
Guided Azure DevOps practices for builds, deployments, and database migrations across environments, implementing change management processes and database source control.
Performed requirements analysis, conducted code reviews, and mentored developers, ensuring robust application development and maintenance through agile methodologies.
Implemented configurable reporting pipelines and designed dynamic user-defined data models, maintaining data integrity and audit trails in complex database applications.

solid-earth.title: Application Developer / Architect (Real Estate MLS Domain)
description: Developed and maintained highly performant RETS client/server software on Oracle and C#, achieving industry compliance multiple times, directly relevant to RESO IDX system integrations.
Built configurable ASP.NET MLS frontends driven by XML, supporting custom branding and business rules for various real estate boards and website initiatives.
Tuned RETS performance, protocol compliance, and data handling for reliable broker and MLS integrations, and investigated/troubleshot complicated database applications and stability issues.
Created a market analytics and statistics module, surfacing deep MLS metrics for brokers and administrators, ensuring database environments support application needs.
Coordinated deployments and maintenance windows with MLS stakeholders to maintain high uptime and data freshness, adhering to software development life cycle best practices.

storable.title: Software Engineer II
description: Built .NET Core services with Hangfire and Entity Framework over PostgreSQL and SQL Server, supporting insurance auto-protect workflows and refining existing backend systems and applications.
Developed and maintained .NET WinForms and web applications, contributing to a full-stack environment and ensuring system stability for various application development needs.

Established unit testing patterns for WinForms and service code, and collaborated on domain-driven design adoption for robust application development and software development life cycle best practices.
Collaborated with product and support to triage production issues, troubleshoot legacy code, and refactor risky areas for improved stability and application performance.

rural-sourcing.title: Senior Software Developer
description: Delivered Microsoft-stack projects for multiple clients, performing full-stack development across WinForms, ASP.NET, and SQL Server.
Mentored junior and mid-level developers, conducted code reviews, and performed production readiness checks to ensure robust application delivery and adherence to development best practices.
Planned and tracked sprints, risks, and milestones, contributing to iterative, agile development methodologies and effective project progress.

prestage-farms.title: Programmer/Analyst
description: Led a team of 6 developers in modernizing legacy VB6 accounting and inventory systems into a single WinForms .NET application with role-based security, including SQL Server integration.
Built a new reporting frontend supporting PDF generation and viewing, improving user-friendly applications and utilities.
Ran Agile roadmaps and milestones, coordinating stakeholders and demos to deliver the modernization ahead of schedule, adhering to software development life cycle best practices.

not-rocket-science.title: Programmer/Analyst
description: Delivered full-stack .NET and SQL Server development for Zen-Noh Grain, supporting inventory and operations workflows.
Designed database schemas and service endpoints, building new table structures and ensuring data consistency across web and mobile surfaces for system integrations.

hancock-whitney.title: Programmer/Analyst I
description: Designed and implemented SQL Server applications to support internal web and desktop tools, focusing on data access and reporting, and developing database systems.
Developed desktop applications and data-driven ASP pages with validation JavaScript, pulling from Access, DB2, and Argo Data sources.
Implemented reporting and data-access front-ends to surface financial data accurately, contributing to robust user-friendly applications.

pk-promotions.title: Web Developer/Consultant
description: Built web-based commodity production management and product evolution tracking systems using ASP and SQL Server, tailored to business workflows and serving as core database applications.
Created sales and marketing tools, working directly with clients to refine requirements analysis and deliver incremental improvements to applications and utilities.

rainmaker.title: Design Consultant
description: Developed components and frontends in VB6, VB.NET, ASP Classic, and ASP.NET Web Forms with Access and SQL Server backends, supporting client campaigns and internal operations.
Assisted in IT system design decisions, contributing to overall architecture and system integration strategies for diverse application development initiatives.

about-nwmls-dotnet-dba.label: .NET Developer / Database Administrator for NWMLS
paragraphs: Results-oriented .NET Developer and Database Administrator with over 15 years of full-stack experience in designing, implementing, and maintaining robust applications and database systems. Proven expertise in C#, ASP.NET, SQL Server, and T-SQL development, with a strong background in real estate MLS environments.

Adept at SQL Server database administration, including architecting database designs, building table structures, creating views and stored procedures, and performing performance tuning and capacity planning. Supports iterative, agile development methodologies and ensures database environments align with application and integration needs, contributing to full software development life cycle best practices.

Experienced in application security, load balancing, monitoring, and troubleshooting, with a commitment to maintaining database integrity, security, and disaster recovery preparedness. Skilled in code reviews, design reviews, and implementing database source control and deployment methods, continuously evaluating new technologies for innovative solutions.
